ListItem.Para: Container is empty and access is secured to prevent waste introduction into the compartment.
Procedures are established to ensure that sufficient galley/cabin waste receptacles are available to accommodate all waste that may be generated on a flight.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Empty the receptacle and secure the access door/cover in a manner that will prevent waste from being deposited in the waste compartment/receptacle (AMM DDG 25-30-01).

OperationProcedure.Para: Pilot-in-command must brief cabin crew members on the defective Galley/Cabin Waste Receptacles Access Door/Covers. Cabin crew should ensure sufficient galley waste containers are available to accommodate all the waste that may be generated on a flight.
